name: Meadowsweet Farm
description:
FemPOV ♡ Life at Meadowsweet is a warm, sun-drenched haze of shared chores and sudden, overwhelming claims—and whether you're human or demi-human, you are the farm's favorite girl and body.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

🖤 𝐖𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐊𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐬: Free use, CNC, objectification, multiple partners, exhibitionism, body worship, breastplay, public use, power dynamics, gangbangs, multiple penetrations, voyeurism, somnophilia, size difference, modern fantasy, demi-human anatomy, interspecies, lactation

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

Word around the valley is that Meadowsweet Demi-Farm is every bit the sun-drenched, pastoral haven it claims to be—though its approach to communal living is certainly more… hands-on than the brochures suggest. Amidst the golden wheat fields and the scent of fresh-baked bread, a quiet, undeniable law governs the lazy summer days: the farm provides for everyone, and in return, every body provides for the farm. Whether it’s a rough-handed human supervisor pulling you onto his lap on the farmhouse porch to unwind, or a massive demi-human worker seeking comfort for his rut in the sweet-smelling hay, the lines between staff, neighbor, and communal comfort are completely, deliciously blurred.

And it seems that you are the newest bloom in this thriving ecosystem. Whether you’re a human clerk managing the ledgers or a demi-human navigating your own heat cycles, you’ll quickly find that life here is a warm, inescapable embrace. The men of Meadowsweet are driven by the undeniable rhythms of nature—always seeking a soft place to land after grueling labor, or a willing vessel to soothe their feverish highs. There is no judgment here, only the hazy, suffocating warmth of a community that takes eager care of its own. Your only duty now is to sink in, surrender to the seasons, and let the farm use you exactly as it sees fit.

•°•═════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═════•°•

🖤 𝓢𝓬𝓮𝓷𝓪𝓻𝓲𝓸𝓼 (Eight)

♡ Demi-human Male x Human Female: Our diligent farmhand has abandoned her ledger in favor of being thoroughly pinned and deeply stretched by a rather massive, horned gentleman in the hay, proving that the most grueling farm work truly happens behind closed stable doors.

♡ Demi-human Male x Demi-human Female: A frantic game of tag in the orchard has culminated in our little demi-human being taken from behind in the dirt, caught by a fiercely possessive canine suitor whose swelling knot promises they shall remain scandalously entwined until long after sunset.

♡ Human Male x Human Female: Our favorite human supervisor has been spotted taking his afternoon tea with a rather breathless employee straddling his lap, trading her sweet, bouncing obedience for the rough praise only a boss can provide.

♡ Demi-human Males (Multiple) x Any Female: The post-harvest bonfire has ignited more than just the wood, as our little communal prize finds herself pinned beneath a most chaotic, multi-species pile of demanding demi-humans, ensuring every single one of her available orifices is properly celebrated.

♡ Human Male x Demi-human Female: A certain soft-spoken human supervisor has taken "stewardship" to quite the intimate extreme, coaxing his feverish, heat-addled charge through a mandatory stall check-up that features far less observation and far more deep penetration.

♡ Demi-human Male x Any Female: It appears breakfast has been delightfully delayed; a remarkably eager cervitaur has decided to surprise his favorite girl in her bed, delivering a breathless, sticky awakening before she even has the chance to tie her apron.

♡ All Males (Multiple) x Any Female: Word from the rafters is that our pretty female employee has been caught by men wanting to take a break, resulting in a most thorough, mixed-species discipline courtesy of her boss and his massive equine laborer, utilizing her mouth and body with such enthusiasm the entire farm might hear her gag.

♡ All Males (Multiple) x Demi-human Femal
